# services.ax25

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ax25`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ax25.axlisten.config` | `string` | Options that will be passed to the axlisten daemon. |
| `services.ax25.axlisten.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable AX.25 axlisten daemon. |
| `services.ax25.axlisten.package` | `package` | The ax25-apps package to use. |
| `services.ax25.axports` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Specification of one or more AX.25 ports. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.baud` | `signed integer` | The serial port speed of this interface. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.callsign` | `string` | The callsign of the physical interface to bind to. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.description` | `string` | Free format description of this interface. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Enables the axport interface. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.kissParams` | `null or string` | Kissattach parameters for this interface. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.package` | `package` | The ax25-tools package to use. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.paclen` | `signed integer` | Default maximum packet size for this interface. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.tty` | `string` | Location of hardware kiss tnc for this interface. |
| `services.ax25.axports.<name>.window` | `signed integer` | Default window size for this interface. |
